notes: Solid Tetris implementation with ghost piece, DAS, wall kicks, and 7-bag randomizer, but the LINE_CLEAR state calls checkLines() twice (once in lockPiece and again after the animation), causing double-removal bugs, and the I-piece spawn offset feels slightly off.
Excellent implementation with DAS, lock delay, ghost piece, and audio; the only minor flaw is that the line clear animation logic clears the board before the flash effect can render.
Looks like Tetris and basic controls exist, but line clearing is fundamentally broken because rows are removed before the supposed clear animation/state, causing serious gameplay logic issues.
